'''R2-Z1''', pronounced '''Artoo-ZeeOne''', was an [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] owned by a [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] diplomat by the name of [[Tereb Ab'Lon]]. The [[Droid/Legends|droid]] was nicknamed '''Fweep'''.

==Biography==
R2-Z1 was a [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series astromech droid]]. He was owned by Tereb Ab'Lon and was often used to store [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] secrets that the Bothan had discovered.<ref name="AJ3" /> He escaped [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]] with Ab'Lon but was unable to repair the [[Ambassador-class shuttle|''Ambassador''-class shuttle]] after it was damaged in a battle with [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]]. The shuttle came out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] and crashed near the [[Great Pit of Carkoon/Legends|Pit of Carkoon]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. The crash injured Ab'Lon and damaged R2-Z1. The droid was captured by [[Nim Bola]] who planned to sell him to the highest bidder.<ref name="AJ3" />

==Personality and traits==
He had a design flaw that caused him to unconsciously make a noise that sounded like "fweep". He was stubborn and single-minded, which made him very loyal to his master.<ref name="AJ3" />
